LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KAZIM ACAR'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1324 BECAUSE NO PROPOSED AMENDED COMPLAINT IS ATTACHED TO THE MOTION. THE MOTION MAKES LITTLE SENSE BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT CITE ANY NEW FACTS OR LEGAL THEORIES. LASTLY, ALLOWING AMENDMENT AT THIS POINT WOULD BE IMPROPER GIVEN THE PENDING ANTI-SLAPP MOTION TO STRIKE. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT IS THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT WAS FILED ON DECEMBER 9, 2015. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KAZIM ACAR'S MOTION FOR ORDER DISQUALIFYING COUNSEL YOSEF PERETZ AND THE LAW FIRM PERETZ & ASSOCIATES REPRESENTING DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO PRESENT A COGENT BASIS FOR DISQUALIFICATION. MR. PERETZ IS PROPERLY REPRESENTING HIMSELF IN PRO PER IN THIS ACTION. IT IS UNCLEAR HOW HIS REPRESENTATION OF MS. CRANE AND MS. RAHRAVAN IN THE OTHER ACTIONS CREATES A GROUND FOR DISQUALIFICATION. THE COURT NOTES THAT MS. CRANE AND MS. RAHRAVAN ARE CURRENTLY NOT PARTIES TO THIS ACTION. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kazim Acar telephone number 415-912-6800 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Yosef Peretz telephone number 415-732-3777 Defendant in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KAZIM ACAR'S Motion To Amend Complaint is denied. Plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1324 because no proposed amended complaint is attached to the motion. The motion makes little sense because plaintiff does not cite any new facts or legal theories. Lastly, allowing amendment at this point would be improper given the pending anti-SLAPP motion to strike. The court notes that the operative complaint is the first amended complaint that was filed on December 9, 2015. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Disqualifying Counsel Yosef Peretz And The Law Firm Peretz & Associates Representing Defendants
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kazim Acar telephone number 415-912-6800 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Yosef Peretz telephone number 415-732-3777 Defendant in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF KAZIM ACAR'S Motion For Order Disqualifying Counsel Yosef Peretz And The Law Firm Peretz & Associates Representing Defendants is denied. Plaintiff fails to present a cogent basis for disqualification. Mr. Peretz is properly representing himself in pro per in this action. It is unclear how his representation of Ms. Crane and Ms. Rahravan in the other actions creates a ground for disqualification. The court notes that Ms. Crane and Ms. Rahravan are currently not parties to this action. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.
